nasb.text: They burned the city with fire, and all that was in it. Only the silver and gold, and articles of bronze and iron, they put into the treasury of the house of the Lord.

esv.text: And they burned the city with fire, and everything in it. Only the silver and gold, and the vessels of bronze and of iron, they put into the treasury of the house of the Lord.

cnv.text: 眾人把城和城中的一切都用火燒了；只有金銀和銅鐵的器皿都放入耶和華聖所的庫房裡。

ccb.text: 以色列人烧毁全城和城内一切的东西，只把金银和铜铁器皿放在耶和华的库房里。
